content: A blacksmith hammering a glowing red-hot piece of metal on an anvil, with sparks flying as the hammer strikes the heated iron.
A bowl of cheese puffs, the pale yellow puffed corn snacks, served in a white plate with a green floral border pattern.
A kumquat tree heavily laden with ripe orange kumquats, the small oval citrus fruits clustered among glossy dark green leaves in bright sunlight.
A hot toddy in a clear glass mug, made with a warm amber-colored liquid, a cinnamon stick stirrer, and a twisted lemon peel garnish on the rim.
An aerial view of a large alpine lake surrounded by snow-capped mountains, most likely Lake Como in northern Italy, with the distinctive narrow branching shape of the lake visible from high altitude.

A botanical illustration of *Bromelia fastuosa*, a bromeliad plant, showing its tall central spike covered in silvery-green leaves and clusters of red and pink tubular flowers, with broad red-tinged basal leaves spreading outward at the base.
A wooden cricket bat with a flat, wide blade made of light brown willow and a black rubber-wrapped handle.
Three tall metal poles photographed from directly below looking upward, with leafy tree branches and a clear blue sky visible around them.
A dark red and black canister vacuum cleaner with a flexible corrugated hose and a telescoping wand with a handle, shown against a white background.

An upholstered ottoman with a muted, earth-toned tapestry fabric featuring abstract geometric and floral patterns in shades of green, rust, and beige, sitting on small wooden feet on a hardwood floor. A matching armchair is partially visible behind it.
Four historic baseball bats on display in a museum exhibit, including three natural wood bats and one black Hoosier bat labeled with Mark McGwire's name, each accompanied by a descriptive placard.
A close-up view of reddish-brown gravel or crushed rock, consisting of small, irregularly shaped pebbles spread across the ground.
Several freshly caught whole fish, likely grouper or snapper, hanging together at a fish market, their mouths open and red eyes visible.

A rosy barb, a small freshwater aquarium fish with silvery scales, bright orange-red coloring on its sides, and a distinctive black spot, swimming in a planted tank with green aquatic grass in the background.
A detailed black-and-white scientific illustration of a common bream (*Abramis brama*), a deep-bodied freshwater fish, shown in side profile with clearly rendered scales, fins, and facial features.
Two sunflower seeds side by side — one shelled, showing the pale cream-colored inner kernel, and one unshelled, displaying the characteristic black hull with white stripes.

A collection of seeds from many different plant species, arranged in rows against a black background, showing a wide variety of shapes, sizes, textures, and colors including round, oval, elongated, smooth, ridged, and spiny forms.
A collection of smooth, rounded river pebbles in shades of grey and blue-grey, packed closely together with a few dry leaves and twigs visible in the gaps between them.

A large, formal Japanese public building — likely a municipal hall, museum, or government facility — constructed of light grey brick with tall narrow windows, decorative crenellated parapet details, and neatly trimmed hedges and a cloud-pruned pine tree in front.
A domestic pigeon with white and grey-blue mottled plumage, standing on a sawdust-covered surface and wearing a small identification ring on its leg.
A woman wearing glasses holds both hands pressed against her temples and forehead, head bowed, in a pose expressing stress or a headache, standing in a dimly lit institutional corridor.

Two champagne flutes filled with mimosas sit on a white table beside a bottle of brut sparkling wine chilling in an ice bucket, with a cork and a small glass of orange juice nearby, at what appears to be a poolside setting.

A mullein plant (Verbascum thapsus) in full growth, with its characteristic tall central spike topped with small yellow flowers rising from a rosette of large, soft, gray-green leaves, growing in a rocky, scrubby landscape.
A mimosa tree (Acacia dealbata) in full bloom, covered in dense clusters of tiny, fluffy, bright yellow flowers among feathery green foliage.
A eucalyptus tree branch bearing clusters of fluffy white blossoms and rounded seed capsules among long, narrow leaves, photographed against the pale bark of the trunk.
A single unlit cigarette with a white paper body and a tan filter tip, shown diagonally against a white background.

A historical medical engraving depicting a surgeon using a trepanning drill (trephine) to bore into a patient's skull, a procedure known as trepanation, as illustrated in an early modern surgical or anatomical textbook.

A British seaside town viewed from across a tidal estuary or beach at low tide, showing a seafront with amusement arcades, shops, and residential buildings behind them, with wet sand and shallow water in the foreground.
A fashion illustration sketch of a full-length cape coat with a layered shoulder capelet, a shirt collar, and a necktie visible at the center front, drawn in black ink with gray wash shading.
A large black swallowtail butterfly with white and red markings on its wings, perched on a bright red zinnia flower in a garden.
A pen-and-ink drawing of two decorative tassels, one with an ornate woven and knotted top and one with stacked beaded ornaments, both hanging from twisted cords with long flowing fringe below.
A loose pile of steel finishing nails, the slender metal fasteners with small heads and sharp points, scattered randomly on a light surface.
A close-up of galvanized chicken wire, a type of hexagonal wire mesh fencing made from twisted metal wire, with a dark wooden structure visible behind it.

A brown bat in mid-flight with its wings fully spread, showing the thin, veined membrane stretched between its elongated finger bones, with large ears and a small furry body visible against a dark background.

A full-scale model or engineering replica of a spacecraft — likely the Huygens probe or a similar ESA planetary lander — displayed indoors in a glass-walled building, showing its gold-foil-covered disc-shaped body with instruments, antennas, and scientific equipment mounted around its circumference.
A bushy wormwood plant (Artemisia absinthium) growing in a garden, with its characteristic silvery-grey, deeply lobed aromatic leaves spreading outward in a dense mound.
A traditional absinthe glass filled with bright green absinthe liqueur, set on a wooden railing outdoors, with a slotted silver absinthe spoon leaning against it.

A close-up of black satin fabric embroidered with an ornate gold damask pattern, featuring a central fleur-de-lis-style motif surrounded by scrolling acanthus leaves and floral details worked in metallic gold thread.
A clear blue daytime sky with scattered wispy white clouds, including thin cirrus clouds and a few small cumulus clouds.
Two large round bales of straw sitting in a harvested field, with rolling farmland visible in the background.
A mature millet panicle, the dried seed head of a millet plant, with clusters of small pale grain-filled husks hanging from slender stalks.
A Portuguese man o' war, a colonial marine organism with a translucent blue-tinted gas-filled float and long trailing blue tentacles, lying on a white surface out of water.
A close-up of a young woman's neck and collarbone area, with her dark hair pulled back in a ponytail and wearing a black tank top, lit by warm directional light.
Four wine and spirits bottles of different sizes and colors — blue, dark green, black with a red foil capsule, and brown — standing together against a light green background.
A vivid aurora borealis, or northern lights, filling the night sky with sweeping curtains of bright green light above a calm coastal fjord with snow-capped mountains in the background.
A whole orange sitting next to its freshly removed peel, which has been stripped off in several connected strips and laid flat on a countertop.
A large collection of dildos and other sex toys in various sizes, shapes, and colors — including flesh-toned, orange, brown, green, and red — piled together on a white shelf.

Three structural beam cross-section diagrams showing, from left to right, a solid rectangular beam, a standard steel I-beam (or H-beam), and a steel I-beam with bolt holes in the flanges, all drawn in simple isometric illustration style.
A mimosa tree (Acacia dealbata) in full bloom, covered in dense clusters of tiny, fluffy, bright yellow flowers among feathery green foliage.

Two champagne flutes filled with mimosas sit on a white table beside a bottle of brut sparkling wine chilling in an ice bucket, with a cork and a small glass of orange juice nearby, at what appears to be a poolside setting.
A flesh fly resting on a piece of bark, showing its distinctive dark bristly body, large reddish compound eyes, and transparent wings folded over its back.
A close-up of British DPM (Disruptive Pattern Material) camouflage fabric, showing the characteristic pattern of irregular shapes in green, brown, black, and tan used on military clothing and gear.
A close-up of the hemmed edge of a white cotton fabric printed with small red flowers and a thin gold grid pattern, lying on a dark brown shag carpet.
A strip of decorative lace trim, showing two rows of looped and scalloped patterns with teardrop-shaped openings, typical of tatted or bobbin lace edging.
An aerial view of a vast patchwork of agricultural farmland, with rectangular fields in varying shades of green, gold, and brown stretching to the horizon under a hazy blue sky.
A steel hex bolt with a six-sided head and a partially threaded shank, showing some surface grime and light corrosion.
A Harvard University competitive swimmer performing the butterfly stroke in a pool, wearing a white Harvard swim cap and goggles.

A collection of assorted batteries of various sizes and types, including AA, AAA, C, and 9-volt batteries from brands such as Duracell, Panasonic, and Energizer, along with a battery charger holding two rechargeable batteries.
Two glass bottles and a drinking glass filled with palm wine (toddy), a milky-white fermented alcoholic beverage tapped from palm trees, sitting on a wooden table in an open-air rural bar or shack.
A farmer using a white draft horse harnessed to a plow to till a field, with an orchard visible in the background.

A weathered, dilapidated old wooden rowboat with its oars displayed as a decorative feature on a white rooftop terrace in Santorini, Greece, with the deep blue Aegean Sea and volcanic cliffs visible in the background.
A young slash pine or loblolly pine tree standing alone on the manicured green fairway of a golf course, with a partly cloudy sky and more trees visible in the background.
A fluid-filled blister on human skin, appearing as a raised, translucent dome of fluid trapped beneath the outer layer of skin.
A man wearing a khaki utility kilt with pleats and cargo pockets, paired with a green sweater, grey knee-high socks, and tan boots, standing on a wooden deck.
Two small chunks of white crystalline mineral or chemical substance, each roughly 1–2 centimeters in size, placed on a gray surface next to a ruler for scale.
A large yellow Liebherr tower crane standing at an industrial yard or construction site, with stacks of steel plates and materials on the ground below it and a wooded hillside in the background.

A young woman posing at what appears to be a fashion or entertainment event, wearing a short black vinyl lace-up mini dress and a black feather boa draped over her shoulders, standing in front of a pink painted backdrop.
A middle-aged man wearing a dark coat and a gray fringed scarf, standing at what appears to be an outdoor sports stadium with spectators visible in the background.
A large boa constrictor coiled on sandy ground, its thick body showing the characteristic pattern of tan, brown, and reddish-brown saddle markings typical of the species.

A close-up comparison of a small plant's seed capsule opening over time, showing the progression from a partially open fruit to a fully open capsule revealing the cluster of small black seeds inside, with the plant's oval green leaves visible around it.

Two pharmaceutical capsules marked with dosage numbers — one red capsule labeled "150" that has been opened, spilling its tiny white pellet contents, and one intact pink-and-white capsule labeled "75."

An artist's illustration of a spacecraft reentry capsule plunging through Earth's atmosphere, its heat shield glowing bright orange-red from the intense friction of atmospheric reentry, with streaks of fire trailing behind it against the blue curve of Earth below and the black of space above.
An indoor spa or wellness pool area bathed in dramatic red ambient lighting, with a small rectangular plunge pool in the foreground and white lounge chairs arranged along the side.
A rice plant in the field, showing a mature panicle with plump grain-filled spikelets drooping from the stalk, surrounded by green rice plants in the background.

Two pharmaceutical capsules marked with dosage numbers — one red capsule labeled "150" that has been opened, spilling its tiny white pellet contents, and one intact pink-and-white capsule labeled "75."
A large tree stump left after a mature tree was felled, with a wide, flat cut top and prominent surface roots spreading outward across the ground, surrounded by leaf litter in a woodland clearing.

Leonardo da Vinci's mural painting *The Last Supper*, depicting Jesus Christ seated at the center of a long table with his twelve apostles in a rectangular hall, painted on the refectory wall of Santa Maria delle Grazie in Milan.

A public monument in a Latin American city featuring two bronze statues of indigenous figures jointly lifting a large painted globe or fruit above their heads, mounted on a base of river stones at a street intersection.
A large pile of dead bats heaped on a Thailand-branded burlap sack, apparently prepared for sale as bushmeat at a market.
A large glass mug of Bitburger beer, a German lager, sitting on an outdoor café table with a menu and promotional card nearby.

A commercial refrigerator fully stocked with a wide variety of chilled soft drinks, including cans and bottles of Coca-Cola, Pepsi, Fanta, Red Bull, Estrella Galicia beer, and various juices and energy drinks arranged across multiple shelves.

An aircraft flight data recorder, commonly known as a "black box," manufactured by AlliedSignal and painted bright orange, with a French label reading "ENREGISTREUR DE VOL NE PAS OUVRIR" (Flight Recorder — Do Not Open).
A brass plumb bob, a heavy hexagonal metal weight with a pointed tip, suspended from a string and resting on a wooden surface.
A close-up macro photograph of human skin, showing the fine texture of pores, creases, and surface lines on pale, light-toned skin.
Three Staunton-style chess pieces — two white pieces (a king and a queen) and one black king — standing on a wooden chessboard with the classic light and dark square pattern.
A rough, uncut natural diamond with a deep orange-brown color, showing the characteristic lumpy, resinous surface texture of a raw diamond crystal.
A talking drum, a West African hourglass-shaped drum with a decorated woven body and a curved beater stick resting beside it.
A female singer performing on a smoke-filled concert stage under blue and white spotlights, with a large crowd of fans in the foreground raising their hands and holding up phones.
A golf course putting green with a flagstick topped by an American flag marking the hole, with a golf ball resting on the green nearby and a backdrop of large green trees.
A satellite view of Earth from space, showing the Atlantic Ocean, the western coast of Africa, and swirling white cloud formations against the black backdrop of space.
A view of Earth from the edge of space, showing a vast expanse of white clouds below, the curved blue arc of the atmosphere along the horizon, and a crescent Moon visible against the black sky above.

A medical illustration of the human eye socket (orbit) showing a cross-sectional front view of the eyeball within the bony orbital cavity, with the extraocular muscles, optic nerve, and blood vessels clearly depicted.
A rough, irregularly shaped specimen of black tourmaline (schorl), a dark crystalline mineral with a slightly glittery, granular surface texture.
An elderly man wearing glasses and a striped shirt drinking from a stemless wine glass containing rosé wine, with another older man and a European courtyard visible in the background.
A round fruit cake or tea bread studded with raisins and mixed peel, cooling on a wire rack after baking.
A nighttime photograph of the constellation Hydra, with its stars connected by lines to show the pattern, labeled with the name "Hydra" against a dark blue starry sky above a silhouetted treeline.
A showroom floor displaying multiple black lacquered grand pianos with their lids propped open, each accompanied by a matching padded piano bench.

A double-hemisphere world map titled "Orbis Terrae Compendiosa Descriptio," a hand-colored antique cartographic atlas page from the late 16th century, showing the entire known world divided into Eastern and Western hemispheres with ornate decorative borders and Latin text below.

Two uniformed officers stand silhouetted on the concourse floor of a large train station, with dramatic shafts of sunlight streaming down through tall clerestory windows high above them. This is a classic black-and-white photograph of Chicago Union Station, taken by Jack Delano in 1943.
An electric arc furnace in a steel mill, with molten metal glowing intensely orange and red as it is smelted, surrounded by industrial equipment and safety railings.

A female weightlifter in an Adidas competition singlet performing a clean, holding a loaded barbell at shoulder height in what appears to be a German weightlifting competition, with a scoreboard and sponsor banner visible in the background.
A spoonful of Dijon mustard, the smooth, pale yellow-green prepared condiment, sitting in a metal spoon.
A white-spectacled bulbul or similar bulbul species perched on a plant stem, with olive-yellow plumage on its body and wings, a dark black head with white-speckled cheeks, and a red eye.

A bittersweet nightshade plant (Solanum dulcamara) growing in dark soil, showing its distinctive purple star-shaped flowers with yellow stamens alongside clusters of small berries in various stages of ripeness, from green to orange to red.
A cluster of bright yellow mustard flowers in bloom, with the characteristic four-petaled blossoms of the mustard plant, surrounded by slender green stems and leaves.
A dried, curled seed pod from a plant, forming a near-complete ring shape, with a single white seed still attached at one end.

A jockey wearing a yellow, blue, and black silks and orange helmet sits atop racehorse number 15 as a handler in a black suit leads the horse around the parade ring at a Japanese horse racing track, with officials and spectators visible in the background.
A patch of tall wild grass and weeds in the foreground, with a brown wooden building, parked cars, and fog-shrouded trees visible in the background.

A slender woody branch with small serrated leaves that transition from deep green at the base to golden-yellow and copper tones toward the tips, likely a young spirea or similar ornamental shrub showing new seasonal growth.
A branch of Sarcococca (sweet box) or a similar shrub bearing clusters of small, bright red berries among narrow green leaves, growing amid dried woody stems and grass-like foliage.
A small heap of mustard seeds, the tiny round yellow-brown seeds of the mustard plant, piled together with some scattered around the edges, shown next to a 20 mm scale bar.
A young man with dreadlocks holding a cigarette, smiling in front of a colorful abstract mural.

A botanical illustration of thyme (*Thymus vulgaris*), showing the whole plant with its woody stems, small oval leaves, and tiny pink flowers, along with detailed diagrams of its individual flower parts, seeds, and cross-sections arranged around the central plant.

A dissected or preserved human thyroid gland shown from above, with its two lobes spread out and the tracheal attachment visible at the top, photographed against a black background with a 1 cm scale bar.
A sepia-toned engraved portrait of a middle-aged man from the early 19th century, wearing a dark coat, white shirt, and bow tie, with curly hair receding at the temples.
A U.S. Army soldier in digital camouflage uniform traversing a rope obstacle on a military training course, hanging upside down with his hands gripping the rope and his legs hooked over it.
A narrow rural canal or drainage channel lined with reeds and vegetation, leading toward a small European village with a church steeple and farm buildings set among green fields and wooded hills.
A promotional photo of a three-person rock band, featuring a woman with dark curly hair at the center flanked by two men, all dressed in black against a moody, fog-filled dark forest backdrop.
A black, crusty bracket fungus, likely a species of *Daldinia* (carbon balls or King Alfred's cakes), growing on a piece of dead wood, with a distinctive dark, pitted, and bumpy surface texture.

Seven young women, likely a K-pop girl group, pose together on a concert stage wearing colorful coordinated outfits in shades of blue, pink, yellow, denim, white, coral, and red, with a purple-lit backdrop behind them.
A pile of frankincense resin, the dried hardened sap harvested from Boswellia trees, consisting of small irregular pale yellow and tan lumps used as incense and in traditional medicine.
A small elephant shrew (also called a sengi), a tiny insectivorous mammal with large rounded ears, a pointed snout, and long hind legs, caught mid-stride on a forest floor.

A Victorian-era glass cruet set consisting of two salt and pepper shakers with silver-plated tops and a small glass condiment bottle, all held together in a matching cut-glass and silver-plated caddy with a carrying handle.
A high-speed close-up of a water droplet impact, showing the classic crown splash with a central dome of water, a ring of upward-shooting jets, and tiny airborne droplets scattered above the surface.
A male great curassow, a large ground-dwelling bird with glossy black plumage, a distinctive blue-purple throat wattle, and a brown-tinged back, standing on dry grass.
A brass trumpet, a valved brass wind instrument with a flared bell, three piston valves, and a mouthpiece, shown in a polished gold lacquer finish against a white background.
A middle-aged East Asian woman wearing a light blue traditional Chinese qipao (cheongsam), giving a salute with her right hand raised to her forehead.
Two bramblings, small finches with orange-brown and dark-streaked plumage, foraging for seeds on a snow-covered ground near dry grass stems in winter.

A scientific illustration of the Madagascar Serpent Eagle (*Eutriorchis astur*), a rare raptor with dark brown upperparts, barred white-and-brown underparts, yellow feet, and orange eyes, perched on a branch with foliage.
A middle-aged man with a mustache, wearing a plaid flannel shirt, playing a brass trumpet outdoors with a body of water visible behind him.
A white fancy pigeon with a fluffy crest on its head, shown in profile against a plain gray background.
A trumpeter swan, a large white bird with a long curved neck and black bill and feet, standing on a wet rocky surface near the water's edge.
A small brown-streaked flycatcher perched on a wire, with blurred tree branches and a pale sky in the background.
The fossilized skull of a mosasaur, a large extinct marine reptile from the Cretaceous period, displayed in a museum with its long, narrow jaws open and rows of sharp conical teeth clearly visible.
An eight-person rowing crew in a long narrow racing shell on calm water, seen from directly above, with all eight oars extended symmetrically to either side.
Two male athletes competing in a pairs rowing event, seated in a racing shell and pulling their oars with intense concentration on a bright blue body of water.
A skunk cabbage (Symplocarpus foetidus) emerging from the soil in early spring, showing its mottled dark red and cream spathe curled around the knobby yellow spadix inside.
A bacterial culture growing on an agar plate in a petri dish, showing streaked colonies and isolated round colonies, with a close-up inset of a single pale yellow-cream bacterial colony.
A Diademed Sandpiper-Plover, a small shorebird with brownish plumage and a distinctive rufous collar, standing on a grassy mound in a green meadow.

A sturgeon, a large prehistoric-looking freshwater fish with a long pointed snout, rows of bony scutes along its back and sides, and a distinctive heterocercal tail, shown in a side-profile illustration.

A botanical illustration of a Hakea species, an Australian shrub, showing a branch with long serrated leaves, a spiky spherical seed pod, and a cluster of needle-like flowers, along with detailed insets of individual flower parts.

A Microsoft Visual Studio IDE window showing an MFC Windows Application project open in debug mode, with C++ source code visible in the editor, a Breakpoints & Markers panel at the bottom, a Call Stack panel on the right, and a Project Browser on the left.
A palomino horse being shown at a halter class by a handler dressed in black with a cowboy hat, standing on a grass lawn in front of a red brick building.
A turmeric plant (Curcuma longa) with a tightly closed green flower bud emerging from the center of its leafy stalk, growing in a garden bed with bare soil visible in the background.
A chestnut Arabian horse with white stockings on its lower legs, trotting freely inside a white-fenced paddock with trees and open sky in the background.

A white pit bull terrier sitting proudly on a farm lawn next to a dead fox it has killed, with chickens, ducks, and geese roaming freely in the background — the dog apparently having protected the poultry from the predator.

A large chunk of glacial ice sitting on a dark volcanic beach at the water's edge, backlit by a low sun that makes the translucent blue-green ice glow brilliantly — a scene typical of Iceland's Diamond Beach.

A geologist wearing a hard hat stands beside a large exposed rock outcrop or excavated sedimentary deposit, holding a notebook and examining the layered conglomerate and sandy sediment face of the cut.

A tropical beach with a tall, leaning coconut palm in the foreground, a calm bay with small boats anchored offshore, a coastal village along the shoreline, and lush green mountains rising under a partly cloudy sky in the background.

A rock band performing on a dimly lit stage, with a female vocalist singing into a microphone while holding a guitar, and a male drummer playing a drum kit behind her, all bathed in purple stage lighting.
An ocean shoreline on an overcast day, with waves breaking and washing white foam onto a sandy beach.
Two people are watering a sand-footed equestrian arena with a hose, sending a wide arc of water across the enclosed riding ring, while a small dog stands nearby on the grass.

A person wearing a blue jacket wading waist-deep through a flooded street or park, with murky brown floodwater stretching across the entire area and partially submerged trees and utility poles visible in the background.
Water flowing from a kitchen or bathroom faucet, captured in a close-up shot that shows the turbulent, bubble-filled stream of tap water pouring downward from the spout.

A promotional logo for Ice Water Entertainment, featuring a close-up of a person wearing large tinted sunglasses overlaid with a semi-transparent blue graphic design and the company name "ICE Water Ent." at the bottom.
A woman with red hair wearing ear protection muffs aims a semi-automatic pistol at a paper silhouette target at an indoor shooting range.

A mineral specimen showing native gold or chalcopyrite crystals with a brassy, metallic golden luster embedded in a white quartz matrix, with dark needle-like crystals of a secondary mineral such as stibnite or tourmaline scattered throughout.
The Wikipedia article on "Web page," showing the encyclopedia entry with its definition, navigation sidebar, and a thumbnail screenshot of a web page on the right side.
A larch tree branch covered in soft, bright green needles and numerous small, rounded brown cones at various stages of maturity.
A colorful orchard spider, with a distinctive green, yellow, and black striped abdomen and long green legs, clinging to its web with a leafy green background behind it.

The front page of the first issue of *Nature* magazine, dated Thursday, November 4, 1869, showing its masthead title in large decorative letters, its subtitle "A Weekly Illustrated Journal of Science," and the opening article "Nature: Aphorisms by Goethe."
A wild white violet (*Viola* species) in bloom, with five white petals marked by dark purple veins and a yellow center, growing among its characteristic heart-shaped green leaves on the forest floor.
An arctic fox in its thick white winter coat, sitting upright in the snow and looking directly forward with amber eyes.
A wild rose in full bloom, with five broad white petals surrounding a cluster of yellow stamens, growing among green serrated leaves on a thorny shrub.
A dunnock (hedge sparrow) perched on a snow-dusted twig in winter, its brown and grey streaked plumage puffed slightly against the cold.
A large cluster of ripe Pinot Gris grapes hanging on the vine, their skins showing a dusty pinkish-gray color with a natural bloom, surrounded by green and browning leaves.
A wattle (Acacia) shrub or tree with long, narrow blue-grey phyllodes and clusters of small, fluffy yellow flowers, photographed outdoors against a blue sky.

A botanical illustration of celery (*Apium graveolens*), showing the whole plant with stems, lobed leaves, and clusters of small white flowers, along with detailed diagrams of the flower, seed, root, and cross-sections of the fruit.

A detailed botanical illustration of cardamom (*Elettaria cardamomum*), showing the whole plant with its large leaves, blue-and-white flowers, seed pods, rhizome roots, and cross-sectional diagrams of the seeds and fruit.

A plate of cooked stuffed sausages and offal, likely including kishka (stuffed intestine filled with grain and fat) and other traditional Eastern European or Middle Eastern stuffed organ meats, served on a white plate with a yellow rim.
Several cardamom pods shown whole, split open, and with loose seeds scattered separately, displaying the green outer husks and the small, dark reddish-brown aromatic seeds inside.
A tulip-shaped stemmed glass half-filled with a deep ruby-red liquid, likely a port wine or fruit liqueur.
Several cardamom pods in various stages of being opened, showing the small dark seeds inside, scattered across a white surface alongside a small pile of loose ground cardamom or fine seeds.

A SCOBY (symbiotic culture of bacteria and yeast) used for brewing kombucha, sitting in a glass petri dish on a wooden surface. The SCOBY is a pale, gelatinous, rubbery disc-like mass with an irregular, lumpy shape.

Afghan security forces conducting a combat training drill at a military or police compound, with one soldier standing over another who is on the ground while a third restrains him, as other personnel look on in the background.

A large early 20th-century German public building, likely a town hall or school, built in sandstone with steep dark roofs, stepped gables, and a clock tower rising at the rear, situated on a street corner with pedestrians passing by.

A large Victorian-era red brick institutional building, likely a school, hospital, or civic hall, featuring a prominent clock tower with a pointed spire, Gothic-style arched windows, and well-maintained grounds with green lawns.
A Japanese government or corporate building complex with two modern grey structures, flanked by manicured pine trees and two flagpoles flying the Japanese national flag under a clear blue sky.
A drill monkey (Mandrillus leucophaeus) sitting on a rock ledge in a zoo enclosure, its dark face and colorful rump visible as it rests in a hunched posture.
A child wearing plain white elastic-waist pants with cuffed ankles, shown from the waist down.

A small-town or mid-sized city downtown square or plaza in early spring, featuring bare deciduous trees, concrete planter bowls on a brick median, a traffic light, and a multi-story office or government building visible in the background.
A cordless power drill in blue and yellow, with an 18-volt rechargeable battery pack attached to the handle and a drill bit fitted in the chuck.
A Bosch PSB 550 RE corded electric hammer drill in dark green and black with red accents, fitted with a twist drill bit.

An aerial view of a small South Asian town or institutional campus, with low industrial or administrative buildings partially hidden among dense trees, surrounded by agricultural fields and a river in the background.
A surgeon wearing a green surgical cap, face mask, and latex gloves performs a medical procedure on a patient lying on an operating table.

The Guaita tower, the oldest and most famous of the three medieval fortresses on Mount Titano in San Marino, showing its tall stone battlemented tower rising above the surrounding castle walls and ramparts under a clear blue sky.
Three glasses of kombucha in different stages of fermentation, showing a range of colors from pale golden yellow to medium amber-brown to very dark nearly black.
A peyote cactus (*Lophophora williamsii*) growing in a small pot filled with gravel, its smooth, spineless, blue-green body topped with a single pale pink flower with yellow stamens.
Three views of a small bottle of Mixteco Oaxacan mezcal con gusano (mezcal with worm) from Oaxaca, Mexico, showing the front label, the side, and the back with a barcode and lot number.
A broadleaf plantain (Plantago major) growing in bare soil, with its characteristic rosette of large, oval, prominently veined green leaves spreading outward from a central base.
A margarita or martini-style cocktail served in a classic wide-rimmed cocktail glass, garnished with a lime wedge on the rim, sitting on a paper coaster on a wooden bar counter.
A cluster of Indian gooseberry (amla) fruits hanging from the branches of a Phyllanthus emblica tree, surrounded by its characteristic small, feathery pinnate leaves.
Two small, unripe avocados hanging from the branches of an avocado tree, surrounded by green leaves.

Four bottles of Jameson Irish Whiskey lined up side by side, representing different expressions: the 12-year Special Reserve, the Gold Reserve, the 18-year Limited Reserve, and the Rarest Vintage Reserve.
